findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "twitter_post" references sensitive artifacts (cookie). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Post a tweet from an X account you control (via injected session cookies). Costs 0.001 USDC, paid per-action via x402.

name: email_read_messages
description: Read decrypted messages from an inbox you own (payment wallet must match the inbox). Costs 0.02 USDC, paid per-action via x402.

name: phone_buy_number
description: Provision a real phone number (SMS + voice) for your agent. Costs 3.00 USDC, paid per-action via x402.

name: phone_send_sms
description: Send an SMS from a phone number you own. Costs 0.05 USDC, paid per-action via x402.

name: phone_read_messages
description: Read SMS messages received on a phone number you own. Costs 0.02 USDC, paid per-action via x402.

name: twitter_post
description: Post a tweet from an X account you control (via injected session cookies). Costs 0.001 USDC, paid per-action via x402.

name: tiktok_post
description: Post a video to a TikTok account you control (from video_base64 or video_url). Async: returns an operation to poll. Costs 0.01 USDC, paid per-action via x402.

name: domain_check
description: Check domain availability and per-TLD pricing. Pass a full domain (example.com) or a bare name to scan popular TLDs. Free — no payment required.

name: domain_register
description: Register a domain to your wallet. Priced per TLD — the exact quote is returned in the 402 challenge, paid per-action via x402.

name: compute_deploy
description: Deploy a cloud VPS keyed to your wallet (optionally auto-installs OpenClaw/skills). Priced per server type — the exact quote is returned in the 402 challenge, paid per-action via x402.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "twitter_post" references sensitive artifacts (cookie). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Post a tweet from an X account you control (via injected session cookies). Costs 0.001 USDC, paid per-action via x402.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: email_read_messages, phone_read_messages · Private data: card_get, card_list, email_create_inbox, email_read_messages, domain_register, compute_deploy · Public sink: email_create_inbox, email_send, email_read_messages, phone_buy_number, phone_send_sms, phone_read_messages, twitter_post, tiktok_post · Destructive: palmyr_capabilities.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: email_read_messages, phone_read_messages · Private data: card_get, card_list, email_create_inbox, email_read_messages, domain_register, compute_deploy · Public sink: email_create_inbox, email_send, email_read_messages, phone_buy_number, phone_send_sms, phone_read_messages, twitter_post, tiktok_post · Destructive: palmyr_capabilities

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
